downValuation.title: Down-valuation assessment
downValuation.$comment: Derived comparison between an agreed price and a lending or comparable valuation. Provenance for each input is carried on the associated PDTF verified claims, not inside this object.

isDownValued.title: Is the property down-valued?
isDownValued.description: True when the valuation figure is below the agreed price reference.

priceReference.title: Agreed price reference
priceReference.description: Pointer to the price claim this assessment was compared against.

path.title: JSON pointer to the price claim

value.title: Agreed price value used in the comparison

valuationFigure.title: Valuation figure used in the comparison
valuationFigure.description: Normally mirrors the parent valuation capitalValue.

downValuationAmount.title: Down-valuation amount
downValuationAmount.description: Agreed price value minus valuation figure. Positive when down-valued.

downValuationPercentage.title: Down-valuation percentage
downValuationPercentage.description: Down-valuation amount as a percentage of the agreed price value.

methodology.title: Methodology note
methodology.description: Short description of how the comparable valuation was derived.

$comment: Down-valuation risk assessment derived from an agreed price and a comparable or lending valuation
